company_context: Online Course Platform to Sell Courses and Communities | Thinkific Learn how AI can help improve the learning experience as your business grows. March 17 @ 10am PT / 1pm ET Save my seat × Start free trial Talk to sales Powering the world’s top learning businesses Thinkific is an online course platform that helps you create, market, and sell learning products in one place. Build courses with a drag-and-drop editor, add communities and memberships, and accept payments instantly. Talk to sales Start free trial Trusted by over 35,000 customers Learning experiences that convert on a platform that scales with you Whether you’re selling your personal expertise, scaling an academy, or using online education to expand your company’s revenue, Thinkific equips you with the tools and support you need. Create lasting value, engage with audiences, generate recurring revenue, and evolve your business at every stage. An easy-to-use platform to help you launch faster Get up and running quickly with AI-powered content and design tools, a simple drag-and-drop course builder, and content with tips and insights from successful customers. Explore case studies Industry-leading commerce and payment tools Growth doesn’t have to be forced – it can be built into the very fabric of the learning journey. Our platform creates natural, high-value upsell and cross-sell moments with seamless commerce tools. Explore selling tools Unrivaled customer support From onboarding services to problem resolution, our team is built to be your biggest growth asset. That dedication earned us a top 50 G2 award for customer service — based on customer reviews. Learn more about support The right learning products for your customers From online courses and communities to memberships and digital downloads, Thinkific is the platform that supports every way you want to share and scale your expertise. How teams win with Thinkific Unlocked 486% revenue growth by turning in-person education into a scalable global program using Thinkific Plus Reached 100,000+ enrollments across 20+ countries by building structured learning paths, credentials, and offline access on Thinkific Plus Built a six-figure online academy by packaging real-world expertise into structured courses and programs on Thinkific The results speak for themselves 4.5/5 from over 392 real reviews on G2 We don’t ask you to take our word for it—we let the data do the talking. These awards are fueled by 380 real-world reviews, making us one of the highest-rated solutions for 2025. G2’s rigorous ranking system ensures that only the most reliable, high-impact products make the cut. Thinkific’s stand-out suite of features Build high-quality learning experiences From online communities to engaging courses, you have the tools and support you need to customize and sell powerful learning experiences exactly the way you want — no developer experience needed. Unlimited courses and digital downloads Unlimited websites, landing pages, and custom domains

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps online course platforms like Thinkific optimize their data management and gain valuable insights. How are you today?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) I'm doing alright, I suppose. We're pretty busy with our own platform development. What makes you think we need your solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand you're busy, and I appreciate your time. From my research, I noticed Thinkific is growing rapidly, and with that growth comes an increasing amount of data. Our solution can help you process and analyze that data more efficiently, allowing you to make better decisions for your business. For example, we've helped similar platforms reduce their data processing time by up to 70%.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) That sounds interesting, but we're already using a few tools for data management. I'm not sure we need another solution, and to be honest, budget is a concern for us right now. We've had some unexpected expenses come up, and I'm not sure we can justify the cost of another tool.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about budget and integration. However, our solution is designed to be highly scalable and can integrate seamlessly with your existing tools. In fact, we've worked with several companies in the ed-tech space and have seen significant ROI. I'd be happy to provide some case studies and discuss how our pricing model can work within your budget. We also offer a free trial, so you can see the benefits for yourself before committing to anything.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still hesitant) I'm not sure... We're also in the process of evaluating a few other solutions from competitors. How does DeepData AI differentiate itself from what's already out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our AI-powered data processing engine is significantly more advanced than what our competitors offer, allowing for faster and more accurate data analysis. Additionally, our customer support team is highly rated, and we pride ourselves on being very responsive to our clients' needs. I'd love the opportunity to show you a demo of our platform and discuss how it can specifically address your challenges. Would you be open to a follow-up meeting next week?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'm curious to see how your solution can help us, and I appreciate your willingness to work with us on pricing and integration. Let me check my calendar... How about Wednesday at 2 PM?

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller could have further emphasized the unique value proposition and ROI of DeepData AI's solution to more effectively address the buyer's budget concerns and differentiate themselves from competitors. Sentiment: Neutral
